# Vatayan Labs

> Independent, data-driven research on Indian banking, payments, mutual funds and capital markets, by Manu Vatayan Jha. Every number is sourced from primary regulatory data (RBI, NPCI, SEBI, AMFI) and company filings. "Vatayan" is Sanskrit for window — a window into how India moves money.

## Live dashboards (interactive, primary data)

- [RBI Annual Report 2025-26 Dashboard](https://vatayanlabs.com/dashboards/rbi-annual-report-2025-26/): India credit growth, payments, money supply and financial inclusion from the RBI Annual Report.
- [India Payments Intelligence](https://vatayanlabs.com/dashboards/india-payments/): UPI, cards and ATM trends from RBI FY26 data, including India's first digital-majority month.
- [India Banking Scorecard](https://vatayanlabs.com/dashboards/indian-banks/): Quarterly GNPA, NIM, RoA, RoE, CRAR, CASA and PAT for 15 Indian banks and NBFCs, Q1FY23-Q4FY26.

## Sector studies (long-form research)

- [Gold](https://vatayanlabs.com/sectors/gold/): India's Rs 16.8 lakh crore gold loan story — 3-part series.
- [Defence](https://vatayanlabs.com/sectors/defence/): "Read the Defence" — 7-part series on India's defence decade, HAL, BEL and the value chain.
- [Microfinance](https://vatayanlabs.com/sectors/microfinance/): The microfinance stress cycle and the CGSMFI-2.0 credit guarantee.
- [Capital Markets](https://vatayanlabs.com/sectors/capital-markets/): 4-part series on India's market infrastructure — depositories (CDSL/NSDL), RTAs and global peers.

## About

- [About Vatayan Labs and the author](https://vatayanlabs.com/about/)
- [Newsletter](https://vatayanlabs.com/newsletter/) (also on Substack: https://curiousinvestinginsights.substack.com/)

Content is free to read and cite with attribution to Vatayan Labs (vatayanlabs.com). Not investment advice.
